title: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, dies in a plane crash
summary: Claude Guillemot, who turned a small Breton store into the video game empire Ubisoft, died in a tragic plane accident, according to multiple sources.

title: Windows 11's new media player uses 3.5 times more RAM and charges for popular codecs
summary: The Windows 11 media player update has drawn criticism for drastically increasing memory consumption and requiring payment for certain codecs.

title: Only 16% of Americans believe AI will have a positive impact on society, study finds
summary: A new study reveals that although 49% of adults in the US use chatbots, only 16% consider artificial intelligence beneficial to society.

title: EU fails to define what a deepfake is as Graham Norton wins court order against deepfakes on Facebook
summary: The lack of a clear definition of deepfake in the EU is highlighted while the British presenter obtains a court order against false content on Facebook.

title: Experts warn AI bubble could burst more forcefully than the dot-com bubble
summary: Professor Damodaran and a market research report agree that AI investment shows signs of a bubble that could collapse.

title: Norway almost completely bans AI in schools as debate arises over young people as AI instructors
summary: While Norway limits the use of artificial intelligence in primary education, other voices point out that younger employees can better teach how to use AI.

title: ChatGPT and Siri move towards becoming smarter personal assistants
summary: OpenAI introduces scheduled tasks in ChatGPT while the new version of Siri is praised as an intelligent and useful assistant.

title: Nobel laureate John Jumper leaves DeepMind for Anthropic, and Trump pressures company against jailbreaks
summary: John Jumper joins Anthropic to work on AI, while Donald Trump demands the company prevent its models from being compromised.

title: China unveils a 2kW portable anti-drone laser while Ukraine turns Russian cages into movie sets
summary: Two stories highlight the evolution of anti-drone technologies: a Chinese laser capable of knocking down drones at 500 meters and the creative reuse of Russian structures.

title: Renewable energy records: solar surpasses coal in the US and China builds a colossal hydroelectric plant
summary: Solar generation exceeded coal for the first time in the United States, while China advances a hydroelectric plant that doubles the power of the Three Gorges Dam.

title: AI generates uncertainty in the video game industry despite record revenues of $201.6 billion
summary: Despite unprecedented revenues, mass layoffs and fear that AI will eliminate entry-level jobs worry workers and developers.

title: iOS 27 brings new features while Android 17 suffers touchscreen and connectivity issues
summary: Apple presents the features of its new operating system for iPhone, while Pixel users report bugs in Android 17.

title: OpenAI triples revenue but burns cash, and hidden debt in AI data centers raises alarm
summary: OpenAI reaches $5.7 billion in quarterly revenue but loses $3.7 billion, while it is revealed that AI investment is backed by hidden debt.

title: Amazon accused of retaliating against workers who supported regulation of its data centers
summary: Two reports indicate that Amazon intimidated and threatened to fire employees who testified or supported the regulation of its AI data centers.

title: Microsoft will end support for Office 2021 in October to push users to Microsoft 365
summary: The company plans to eliminate Office 2021 and offers advice on how to resist the forced migration to the subscription model.

title: Hyundai acquires 100% of Boston Dynamics and will bring the Atlas robot to a car factory
summary: The Korean automaker completes the purchase of the robotics company and plans to integrate the humanoid robot into its production plants.

title: Trump presents the new Air Force One plane, a converted Qatari jet
summary: The President of the United States shows the design of the new presidential plane, adapted from a Qatar Airways aircraft.

title: Bobby Prince, legendary composer of the Doom and Wolfenstein 3D soundtracks, dies at 81
summary: The composer who defined the sound of early first-person shooters has died, leaving an unforgettable musical legacy.

title: Childhood vaccine is preventing hundreds of cancer deaths, study finds
summary: Researchers confirm that the vaccine against human papillomavirus significantly reduces cancer deaths in the population.

title: Russian millionaire sues Italy over seizure of his superyacht and could cost the country millions
summary: The owner of the confiscated yacht claims compensation that, if he wins the case, would mean a large expense for the Italian government.
